final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: scientific visualization, educational poster
Primary request: spectacular cosmic view of the Milky Way's central region with supermassive black hole at center, surrounded by hot accretion disk emitting intense orange-red and white radiation, gravitational lensing creating Einstein ring, billions of stars from blue-white young hot stars to orange-red aging giants, spectacular gas pillars at edges showing red/orange/purple emission nebula colors, two colliding galaxies with tidal tails in distance
Scene/backdrop: deep space black background with countless star points and colorful nebulae, galactic center environment
Subject: supermassive black hole with bright accretion disk, Einstein ring from gravitational lensing, star field with diverse stellar populations, emission nebula gas pillars, merging galaxy pair
Style/medium: Hubble Space Telescope and James Webb Space Telescope photography style, scientific visualization, photorealistic astronomical illustration
Composition/framing: wide cosmic vista, centered on galactic core, deep field perspective
Lighting/mood: intense radiation from accretion disk, glowing nebulae, dramatic stellar illumination, awe-inspiring and scientifically accurate
Color palette: deep space black base, orange-red and white accretion disk glow, blue-white to orange-red stellar spectrum, red/orange/purple emission nebulae
Materials/textures: glowing plasma, stellar atmospheres, gas clouds, gravitational distortion effects
Constraints: maintain scientific accuracy, show gravitational lensing effects, include diverse stellar types, preserve emission nebula color characteristics
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, inaccurate scale relationships, oversaturated colors, fantasy elements, watermark
